title: See Grafana Cloud in action with demo data

blocks.content: See Grafana Cloud in action in a few minutes. You'll install a set of ready-made demo dashboards and read your first one, with no data setup or instrumentation required. You're not billed for this demo data.
You'll install demo data sources and dashboards for a fictional site reliability scenario or a weather dataset.
In the main menu, go to **Apps > Demo Data Dashboards**.
Select a demo, such as the **SRE demo** or the **Weather demo**.
Click **Install Dashboards** to add the demo data sources and dashboards.

Installation uses your current level of access, so it requires a role that can create data sources and dashboards, such as **Administrator**. If you can't install, use the Grafana Play option below instead.
A dashboard folder with the same name as the demo now appears in your dashboards.

### No admin access?

If you can't install demo data, explore a live Grafana instance instead. Open [play.grafana.org](https://play.grafana.org) to browse dashboards and try queries across metrics, logs, and traces without any setup.
Now open a dashboard and get oriented.
Go to **Dashboards** and open your new demo folder.
Open a dashboard, then notice the time range picker, the panels, and any dashboard variables near the top. These are the controls you'll use to explore any dashboard.
You've read your first Grafana Cloud dashboard and know where the core controls live.
Ready to use your own data? Reopen **Get started with Grafana Cloud** and choose **Connect data you already have** or **Send your first metrics**.

---

### More to explore (optional)

- [Work with demo data in Grafana Cloud](/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/connect-send/explore-demo-data/)
- [Connect and send data to Grafana Cloud](/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/)
